scripts.dev:playtest:boot: npm run build:server && npm run build:client && npm run dev:playtest:inner
scripts.dev:playtest:inner: concurrently --handle-input --restart-tries 3 --restart-after 2000 --names server,watch,static -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:watch" "npm run dev:static"
scripts.dev: concurrently --handle-input --names watch,serve -c cyan,green "npm run dev:watch" "npm run dev:static"
